note: Curated recurring highlights at real Paris venues. Dates are relative to today. Each item links to an official source.

events.title: Louvre Museum – Masterpieces
events.description: World-famous collections from antiquity to the 19th century in the historic palace.

events.title: Eiffel Tower – Summit Views
events.description: Iconic iron tower with panoramic decks over the Seine and the city.

events.title: Musée d'Orsay – Impressionists
events.description: Monet, Van Gogh and more in a stunning former railway station.

events.title: Centre Pompidou – Modern Art
events.description: Contemporary art, design and rooftop views in Beaubourg.

events.title: Parc des Buttes-Chaumont – Hilltop Walk
events.description: Dramatic cliffs, lake and temple belvedere in a romantic 19th-century park.

events.title: Marché des Enfants Rouges – Food Hall
events.description: Paris's oldest covered market with global street food and fresh produce.

events.title: Concert at Olympia
events.description: Legendary Paris concert hall hosting touring artists year-round.

events.title: Cinéma du Panthéon – Arthouse Night
events.description: Beloved Latin Quarter cinema for VO films and festival screenings.

events.title: Seine Riverside Stroll – Berges
events.description: Walk, picnic or bike along the redeveloped Seine riverbanks.

events.title: Notre-Dame Quarter – Historic Walk
events.description: Explore the island, bridges and medieval heart of Paris.
